name: Tenet Diplos
description: Itemize and execute with this pair of auto-lock-on, homing-projectile pistols. Shoot from-hip for a more conventional pistol experience. The patented Granum Attaché System reloads the pistols when holstered.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Itemize and execute with this pair of auto-lock-on, homing-projectile pistols. Shoot from-hip for a more conventional pistol experience. The patented Granum Attaché System reloads the pistols when holstered.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tenet Diplos’ lock-on ability not damaging Osprey enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tenet Diplos lock-on ability not working for the Client players when using a Vehicle (Merulina, K-Drive, etc). As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1270984-tenet-diplos-lock-on-not-working-on-k-drive/

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tenet Diplos reverting to a packed/holstered configuration when trying to customize with skins.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tenet Diplos not unlocking the Meeting Adjourned achievement.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed mounting and dismounting a K-Drive while using the Tenet Diplos causing its animation to break.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.3
patchlogs.changes: Tenet Diplos clip size increased to 92 and increased ammo pool to 460.
